shake
fall

rules.cssText: #cc-main ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--cc-toggle-readonly-bg); border: .25rem solid var(--cc-bg); border-radius: 1rem; }

#cc-main .cm__btns { border-left: none !important; border-top: 1px solid var(--cc-separator-border-color) !important; flex-direction: column !important; max-width: none !important; min-width: auto !important; }
#cc-main .cm__btn-group { display: flex !important; flex-direction: column !important; min-width: auto !important; }
#cc-main .pm { border-radius: 0px; inset: 0px; height: auto; max-height: 100%; transform: translateY(1.6em); max-width: none !important; }

#cc-main .pm__table-td::before { color: var(--cc-primary-color); content: attr(data-column); flex: 1 1 0%; font-weight: 600; min-width: 100px; overflow: hidden; padding-right: 2em; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.c-home-summary_inner { display: grid; gap: var(--grid-gutter); grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); grid-template-areas: "text text visual visual" "footer footer visual visual"; }
.c-home-summary_text span:nth-child(2) { position: absolute; top: 3.33333rem; right: calc(100% + 20px); }
.c-home-summary_text span:nth-child(3) { position: absolute; top: 13.3333rem; left: calc(100% + 20px); }

.c-home-summary_footer { position: absolute; bottom: 0px; display: inline-block; width: calc((100vw - var(--grid-gutter)*(var(--grid-columns) - 1) - var(--grid-margin)*2)*3/var(--grid-columns) + var(--grid-gutter)*(3 + -1)); left: calc(100% + 20px); }

.c-featured-links_item.-cta:focus-within .c-featured-links_title span { text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial; text-decoration-thickness: var(--border-size); text-underline-offset: 0.05em; }

.c-featured-links_item.-cta:focus-within .c-featured-links_title::before, .c-featured-links_item.-cta:focus-within .c-featured-links_title::after { content: "(+)"; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }

.c-about-figure_inner > :first-child { position: relative; grid-column: 5 / 8; width: 100%; margin-top: calc(var(--header-height)); height: calc(100vh*var(--head-padding-vh) - var(--header-height) + 100vh*var(--about-head-content-offset-vh)); object-fit: cover; object-position: 50% 30%; }
.c-about-figure_inner > :first-child .c-image_img { position: absolute; inset: 0px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center 15%; width: 100%; height: 100%; }

.c-team-modal_ui::before { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 50%; z-index: -1; background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6) 30%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 100%); }

.c-footer_nav a:hover, .c-footer_nav a.focus-visible { text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial; text-decoration-thickness: var(--border-size); }
.c-footer_menu.-main { display: grid; align-items: flex-end; grid-area: 2 / 1 / auto / -1; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }

.c-footer_coords a:hover, .c-footer_coords a.focus-visible { text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial; text-decoration-thickness: var(--border-size); text-underline-offset: 0.1em; }

.c-footer_copyright { margin-top: clamp(calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-tiny-mobile)),var(--spacing-tiny)/14.4*1vw,calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-tiny))); margin-bottom: clamp(calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-medium-mobile)),var(--spacing-medium)/14.4*1vw,calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-medium))); }

.c-lisa_main { width: 100%; padding-right: calc(calc((100vw - var(--grid-gutter) * (var(--grid-columns) - 1) - var(--grid-margin) * 2) * 8 / var(--grid-columns) + var(--grid-gutter) * (8 + -1)) + var(--grid-margin)); }

.c-lisa_main { inset: calc(50% - 8px) 0px 0px; background-color: var(--color-bg); border-top-left-radius: 8px; border-top-right-radius: 8px; transition: inset 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1); }
.c-lisa_button:hover, .c-lisa_checkbox:hover, .c-lisa_button.focus-visible, .focus-visible.c-lisa_checkbox { border-color: var(--color); background-color: var(--color); color: var(--color-bg); }

.c-lisa_button.-primary:hover::before, .-primary.c-lisa_checkbox:hover::before, .c-lisa_button.-primary.focus-visible::before, .-primary.focus-visible.c-lisa_checkbox::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); }
.c-lisa_button.-secondary, .-secondary.c-lisa_checkbox { background-color: var(--color-bg); color: var(--color); border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--color) 20%, transparent); }

.c-lisa_button.-secondary:hover::before, .-secondary.c-lisa_checkbox:hover::before, .c-lisa_button.-secondary.focus-visible::before, .-secondary.focus-visible.c-lisa_checkbox::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); z-index: -1; }
.c-lisa-step { padding-top: 1.33333rem; padding-bottom: 1.33333rem; padding-right: 1.33333rem; margin-right: calc(var(--grid-margin)*-1); --dialog-font-size: var(--font-size-h3); }

.c-lisa-note_content { width: calc((100vw - var(--grid-gutter)*(var(--grid-columns) - 1) - var(--grid-margin)*2)*6/var(--grid-columns) + var(--grid-gutter)*(6 + -1) + var(--grid-margin)); right: 0px; height: 100%; }
.c-lisa-note_content { bottom: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; max-height: calc(100dvh - var(--header-height)); min-height: min(480px,100dvh - var(--header-height)); }
.c-lisa-note_content { transform: translate3d(clamp(calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-large-mobile)), var(--spacing-large) / 14.4 * 1vw, calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-large))), 0, 0); }
.c-lisa-note_content { transform: translate3d(0, clamp(calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-large-mobile)), var(--spacing-large) / 14.4 * 1vw, calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-large))), 0); }

.c-lisa-note_close { top: var(--grid-gutter); right: calc((100vw - var(--grid-gutter)*(var(--grid-columns) - 1) - var(--grid-margin)*2)*6/var(--grid-columns) + var(--grid-gutter)*(6 + 0) + var(--grid-margin)); }
.c-lisa-note_close { bottom: var(--grid-gutter); left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); box-shadow: 0px 2px 10px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color) 20%, transparent); }
.c-work-list-item { border-top: var(--border-size) solid rgba(0,0,0,0); margin-top: calc(var(--border-size)*-1); border-bottom: var(--border-size) solid rgba(0,0,0,0); }
.c-work-list-item_head-visual { position: absolute; top: 100%; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 20; overflow: visible; }
.c-work-list-item_head-visual .c-image_inner { transform: translateY(-50%); transform-origin: left top; outline: 4px solid var(--color-bg); }
.c-work-list-item_head-visual::after { position: absolute; top: 0px; right: 0px; font-size: var(--font-size-medium); line-height: 1.2; }
.c-work-list-item_content-inner { padding: 0.444444rem 0px 10.6667rem; gap: 0 var(--grid-gutter); grid-template-rows: min-content 1fr auto auto; }
.c-work-list-item_content-inner { padding: 5px 0px 5.33333rem; gap: .3333333333rem var(--grid-gutter); grid-template-rows: auto auto auto auto auto; }
.c-work-filters_dropdown-wrapper { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 10; opacity: 0; }
.c-work-single-hero_grid.-bottom, .-bottom.c-work-next_grid { height: auto; flex-grow: 0; grid-template-areas: "title title title ." "year year category category"; }

.c-work-single-hero_caption > span:last-child, .c-work-next_caption > span:last-child { text-indent: calc((100vw - var(--grid-gutter)*(var(--grid-columns) - 1) - var(--grid-margin)*2)*2/var(--grid-columns) + var(--grid-gutter)*(2 + 0)); }

.c-work-single-hero_caption > span:last-child, .c-work-next_caption > span:last-child { text-indent: calc((100vw - var(--grid-gutter)*(var(--grid-columns) - 1) - var(--grid-margin)*2)*1/var(--grid-columns) + var(--grid-gutter)*(1 + 0)); }

.c-work-single-pitch { padding-top: clamp(calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-huge-mobile)),var(--spacing-huge)/14.4*1vw,calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-huge))); padding-bottom: clamp(calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-medium-mobile)),var(--spacing-medium)/14.4*1vw,calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-medium))); position: sticky; top: 0px; min-height: 80vh; }
.c-work-single-pitch_sticky-area { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; min-height: 200vh; }
.c-list_item a { display: block; padding-right: 3.33333rem; position: relative; }
.c-list_item a::after { content: attr(data-icon); font-size: 0.8em; opacity: 0; margin-top: 0.266667rem; position: absolute; right: 0px; top: 0.0666667rem; }

.c-careers-head { --careers-head-height: calc(min(var(--vh, 1vh) * 100, 100vw)); grid-template-rows: 1fr auto auto; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); grid-template-areas: "title title content content" ". . cta cta" "rail rail rail rail"; }

.c-careers-head { grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto auto; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); grid-template-areas: "title title . ." "content content content content" ". . cta cta" "rail rail rail rail"; }

.c-careers-head_cta:hover .c-careers-head_cta_label { text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial; text-decoration-thickness: var(--border-size); text-underline-offset: 0.1em; }
.c-indent-paragraph_title { position: absolute; top: var(--font-size-h1); transform: translateY(-100%); padding-bottom: 0.4rem; }
.c-values_col:nth-child(2) { display: grid; grid-template-areas: "visual list"; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: var(--grid-gutter); }

.c-values_visual { margin-top: clamp(calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-big-mobile)),var(--spacing-big)/14.4*1vw,calc(0.0666666667rem * var(--spacing-big))); margin-right: calc((100vw - var(--grid-gutter)*(var(--grid-columns) - 1) - var(--grid-margin)*2)*2/var(--grid-columns) + var(--grid-gutter)*(2 + 0)); }
.c-values_visual { grid-area: visual; padding-right: calc((100vw - var(--grid-gutter)*(var(--grid-columns) - 1) - var(--grid-margin)*2)*1/var(--grid-columns) + var(--grid-gutter)*(1 + 0)); }
.u-screen-reader-text\@screen { overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0px, 0px, 0px, 0px); margin: 0px; padding: 0px; width: 1px; height: 1px; border: 0px; position: absolute !important; }

customProperties.--cc-font-family: -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif,"Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji","Segoe UI Symbol"
